.file-embed.background: rgb(40, 40, 40) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.status-bar.background: rgb(40, 40, 40) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.view-content.background: rgb(40, 40, 40) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.background: rgb(40, 40, 40) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.styled-scrollbars.background: rgb(40, 40, 40) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

code.background: rgb(60, 56, 54) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
code.font-family: "Source Code Pro", "Source Code Pro", "Source Code Pro"

div.is-selected.mod-complex.suggestion-i.background: rgb(146, 131, 116) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-active.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(40, 40, 40) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-complex.suggestion-item.background: rgb(146, 131, 116) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-left-split.mod-si.background: rgb(40, 40, 40) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-right-split.mod-s.background: rgb(40, 40, 40) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.prompt.background: rgb(40, 40, 40) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(40, 40, 40) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

hr.background: rgb(40, 40, 40) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

hr.workspace-leaf-resize-handle.background: rgb(40, 40, 40) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

kbd.background: rgb(40, 40, 40) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
kbd.font-family: "Source Code Pro", "Source Code Pro", "Source Code Pro"

mark.background: rgba(215, 153, 33, 0.4) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.background: rgb(60, 56, 54) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.language-js.background: rgb(60, 56, 54) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.language-js code span.font-family: "Source Code Pro", "Source Code Pro", "Source Code Pro"
